title: Bad
why_this_song: Repeated assertion using ironic 'bad' (= very good in 80s slang). Great vocabulary lesson on register shift.
grammar_callouts: present simple assertions: I'm bad, I'm tough

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "world" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "world" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "really" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "really" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Just show your face in broad daylight, ah
Just to tell you once again
This could be a better place, ah

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I'm tellin' you on who I feel, ah
But, my friend, you have seen nothin'
You know I'm bad, I'm bad (bad, bad)

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Michael Jackson one question about "Bad", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Michael Jackson sobre "Bad", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Bad" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Bad" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Bad" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Bad" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Match each English word or phrase to its Portuguese meaning.
exercises.prompt_pt: Associe cada palavra ou expressão em inglês ao significado em português.

teaching_notes_md: **Pedagogy:** Teach the slang shift (bad = good) explicitly — essential cultural knowledge. Contrast with modern slang: 'sick', 'dope', 'lit'.

lines: Just to tell you once again
The word is out, you're doin' it wrong, ah
Gon' lock you up before too long, ah
Just to tell you once again (hoo)
You know I'm bad, I'm bad, shamone (bad, bad, really, really bad)
You know I'm bad, I'm bad (bad, bad)
You know it, you know it (really, really bad)
